variables.input:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }
| fields status

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus] }
| fields healthStatus

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { cause = parsed[properties][cause] }
| fields cause

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][type] }
| fields eventType

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { level = parsed[level] }
| fields level

0.title: Active Issues
0.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeCount = count()

1.title: Events by Status
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus], cause = parsed[properties][cause], eventType = parsed[properties][type], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(healthStatus, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }

2.title: Events by Health Status
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], cause = parsed[properties][cause], eventType = parsed[properties][type], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus] }

3.title: Resource Health Summary
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    resourceId = parsed[resourceId],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    currentHealth = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus],
    previousHealth = parsed[properties][previousHealthStatus],
    eventType = parsed[properties][type],
    cause = parsed[properties][cause],
    details = parsed[properties][details],
    level = parsed[level],
    correlationId = parsed[correlationId],
    eventTime = parsed[time]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(currentHealth, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| sort eventTime desc
| fields title, resourceId, status, currentHealth, previousHealth, eventType, cause, details, level, correlationId, eventTime

4.title: Events by Cause
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus], eventType = parsed[properties][type], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(healthStatus, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { cause = parsed[properties][cause] }
| sort count desc

5.title: Events by Event Type
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus], cause = parsed[properties][cause], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(healthStatus, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { eventType = parsed[properties][type] }
| sort count desc

6.title: Timeline of Events
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus], cause = parsed[properties][cause], eventType = parsed[properties][type], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(healthStatus, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 1h), resultType = parsed[resultType] }

7.title: Total Events
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize totalCount = count()

8.title: Resolved
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Resolved"
| summarize resolvedCount = count()

9.title: Available Resources
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus] == "Available"
| summarize availableCount = count()

10.title: Unavailable Resources
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus] == "Unavailable"
| summarize unavailableCount = count()

11.title: Event Details
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    title = parsed[properties][title],
    resourceId = parsed[resourceId],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    currentHealth = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus],
    previousHealth = parsed[properties][previousHealthStatus],
    eventType = parsed[properties][type],
    cause = parsed[properties][cause],
    details = parsed[properties][details],
    level = parsed[level]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(currentHealth, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| sort eventTime desc
| fields title, resourceId, status, currentHealth, previousHealth, eventType, cause, details, level

12.title: Downtime Events
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][type] == "Downtime"
| summarize downtimeCount = count()

13.title: Platform Initiated
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][cause] == "PlatformInitiated"
| summarize platformCount = count()

14.title: Events by Level
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "ResourceHealth"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], healthStatus = parsed[properties][currentHealthStatus], cause = parsed[properties][cause], eventType = parsed[properties][type]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(healthStatus, array($HealthStatus))
| filter in(cause, array($Cause))
| filter in(eventType, array($EventType))
| summarize count = count(), by: { level = parsed[level] }
| sort count desc
